Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden'

<a class="brand block lg:mr-20 xl:mr-40 focus:outline-black" href="https://www.pst.no/" title="Gå til forsiden"> <span aria-hidden="true" class="icon w-[104px] block" focusable="false"><svg viewbox="0
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 class="type-h4-bold text-white footer-txt">Les mer</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="top-menu-items hidden lg:block"> <ul class="flex gap-4"> <li> <a class="btn--sm btn--beige hover:bg-black active:bg-black transition-colors duration-200 focus:outline-black hover:text-whit
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main-mega-menu h-full relative"> <ul class="wp-menu flex flex-col lg:grid lg:grid-cols-3 xl:flex xl:flex-col xl:flex-row gap-3 lg:gap-[30px] 2xl:gap-[60px] lg:absolute bottom-20 left-auto
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden'

<a class="brand block lg:mr-20 xl:mr-40 focus:outline-black" href="https://www.pst.no/" title="Gå til forsiden"> <span aria-hidden="true" class="icon w-[104px] block" focusable="false"><svg viewbox="0
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a aria-label="Besøk PST på LinkedIn" class="focus:outline-black" href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/pstnorge/" rel="noopener" target="_blank"> <span aria-hidden="true" class="icon svg-fill-white
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a aria-label="Besøk PST på Instagram" class="focus:outline-black" href="https://www.instagram.com/pstnorge/" rel="noopener" target="_blank"> <span aria-hidden="true" class="icon svg-fill-white w-8" f
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'subjectname[]' missing autocomplete attribute

<input class="w-full bg-ui-gray-4 bg-opacity-80 rounded-[2px] px-4 py-[11px] text-ui-beige-1 placeholder:text-ui-gray-9 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ui-beige-3" name="subjectName[]" plac
Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

<input class="w-full bg-ui-gray-4 bg-opacity-80 rounded-[2px] px-4 py-[11px] text-ui-beige-1 placeholder:text-ui-gray-9 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ui-beige-3" name="subjectAddress[]" p

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="w-full bg-ui-gray-4 bg-opacity-80 rounded-[2px] px-4 py-[11px] text-ui-beige-1 placeholder:text-ui-gray-9 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ui-beige-3" name="subjectName[]" plac
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<input autocomplete="off" id="company" name="company" tabindex="-1" type="text"/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
4.1.1 Parsing (2 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'Lion' appears 2 times

id="Lion"
Each ID must be unique on the page
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'Lion-2' appears 2 times

id="Lion-2"
Each ID must be unique on the page
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name

<div :class="[ 'fixed inset-0 z-[500] top-15 min-h-[calc(70dvh-60px)] lg:max-h-[calc(80vh-80px)] backdrop-blur-md lg:overflow-visible before:content-[\'\'] before:absolute before:left-0 be
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (5 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 class="type-h2 text-signal-yellow mb-4">Ønsker du å tipse oss?</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 class="type-h3-bold area-name border-b border-gray-light pb-5 lg:pb-7">Øst </h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 class="type-h4-bold text-white footer-txt">Les mer</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="top-menu-items hidden lg:block"> <ul class="flex gap-4"> <li> <a class="btn--sm btn--beige hover:bg-black active:bg-black transition-colors duration-200 focus:outline-black hover:text-whit
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main-mega-menu h-full relative"> <ul class="wp-menu flex flex-col lg:grid lg:grid-cols-3 xl:flex xl:flex-col xl:flex-row gap-3 lg:gap-[30px] 2xl:gap-[60px] lg:absolute bottom-20 left-auto
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (6 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden'

<a class="brand block lg:mr-20 xl:mr-40 focus:outline-black" href="https://www.pst.no/" title="Gå til forsiden"> <span aria-hidden="true" class="icon w-[104px] block" focusable="false"><svg viewbox="0
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.pst.no/tips-oss/tipsskjema-bokmal/" rel="noopener" target="_blank">tipsskjemaet</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Duplicate ID found: 'Lion' appears 2 times

id="Lion"
Each ID must be unique on the page

SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'Lion-2' appears 2 times

id="Lion-2"
Each ID must be unique on the page

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

<h4 class="type-h4-bold text-white footer-txt">Les mer</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="top-menu-items hidden lg:block"> <ul class="flex gap-4"> <li> <a class="btn--sm btn--beige hover:bg-black active:bg-black transition-colors duration-200 focus:outline-black hover:text-whit
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main-mega-menu h-full relative"> <ul class="wp-menu flex flex-col lg:grid lg:grid-cols-3 xl:flex xl:flex-col xl:flex-row gap-3 lg:gap-[30px] 2xl:gap-[60px] lg:absolute bottom-20 left-auto
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (104 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

<a class="brand block lg:mr-20 xl:mr-40 focus:outline-black" href="https://www.pst.no/" title="Gå til forsiden"> <span aria-hidden="true" class="icon w-[104px] block" focusable="false"><svg viewbox="0

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4

MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="top-menu-items hidden lg:block"> <ul class="flex gap-4"> <li> <a class="btn--sm btn--beige hover:bg-black active:bg-black transition-colors duration-200 focus:outline-black hover:text-whit

<nav class="main-mega-menu h-full relative"> <ul class="wp-menu flex flex-col lg:grid lg:grid-cols-3 xl:flex xl:flex-col xl:flex-row gap-3 lg:gap-[30px] 2xl:gap-[60px] lg:absolute bottom-20 left-auto

Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden'

<a class="brand block lg:mr-20 xl:mr-40 focus:outline-black" href="https://www.pst.no/" title="Gå til forsiden"> <span aria-hidden="true" class="icon w-[104px] block" focusable="false"><svg viewbox="0
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)

Page is missing h1 heading

MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

Start your heading structure with h1

MODERATE

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden'

<a class="brand block lg:mr-20 xl:mr-40 focus:outline-black" href="https://www.pst.no/" title="Gå til forsiden"> <span aria-hidden="true" class="icon w-[104px] block" focusable="false"><svg viewbox="0
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name

<div :class="[ 'fixed inset-0 z-[500] top-15 min-h-[calc(70dvh-60px)] lg:max-h-[calc(80vh-80px)] backdrop-blur-md lg:overflow-visible before:content-[\'\'] before:absolute before:left-0 be
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute

Recurring Issues in Article/News Pages (2 pages scanned)

[ARTICLE PAGES SUMMARY - 2 pages]
Avvik: 16 | Bestått: 0
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1 (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name (×35 across article pages)

<svg viewbox="0 0 879.25 283.46"> <defs> <style> .cls-1 { fill: #ffcd00; } </style> </defs> <g id="Square"> <rect data-name="Square"
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1 (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute (×1 across article pages)

<img :alt="firstPost?.()?.title?.rendered ?? ''" :src="fpImg" class="w-full object-cover aspect-[16/9]" x-show="fpImg"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (5 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3 (×1 across article pages)

<h3 class="type-h5-display text-balance font-medium group-hover:underline group-active:underline decoration-1 underline-offset-2 active:underline">Sjef PST i NTV 2026: – Vi beskriver et alvorlig truss
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4 (×1 across article pages)

<h4 class="type-h4-bold text-white footer-txt">Les mer</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label (×4 across article pages)

<nav class="top-menu-items hidden lg:block"> <ul class="flex gap-4"> <li> <a class="btn--sm btn--beige hover:bg-black active:bg-black transition-colors duration-200 focus:outline-black hover:text-whit
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4 (×1 across article pages)

<h4 class="type-h4-bold text-white footer-txt">Les mer</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

List contains non-li elements: ['template'] (×1 across article pages)

<ul class="col-span-12"> <template :key="item.id" x-for="(item, index) in posts"> <li class="border-b border-gray py-[40px] md:py-[60px] flex flex-col gap-4 relative" x-show="!(page === 1 && i
List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden' (×2 across article pages)

<a class="brand block lg:mr-20 xl:mr-40 focus:outline-black" href="https://www.pst.no/" title="Gå til forsiden"> <span aria-hidden="true" class="icon w-[104px] block" focusable="false"><svg viewbox="0
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text is very long (270 characters) (×1 across article pages)

<a class="group col-span-12 lg:col-span-6 flex flex-col gap-[10px] sm:gap-[15px]" href="https://www.pst.no/sjef-pst-i-ntv-2026-vi-beskriver-et-alvorlig-trusselbilde/" id="image_0"> <div class="relativ
Shorten link text to be concise while remaining descriptive
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication (×7 across article pages)

<a class="text-[15px] underline hover:no-underline active:no-underline" href="https://www.nrk.no/norge/pst_-nord-korea-bruker-falske-identitetar-for-a-spionere-pa-norske-bedrifter-1.17727609" target="
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link) (×1 across article pages)

<a class="text-white underline hover:no-underline" href="https://www.pst.no/trusselbilde/dagens-trusselbilde/" target="">Gå til dagens trusselbilde</a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text

id="Lion"

python checker.py https://pst.no --max-pages 20 --format html
